data.title: Illumia Invests in Chennai Global Capability Center to Drive Technology and Product Innovation
data.description: Illumia, previously known as Transact + CBORD, has inaugurated a new office at the International Tech Park in Chennai, India. This move signifies the company’s commitment to expanding its global product and technology operations in India.

data.title: KuCoin and Lightnet Explore Collaboration to Advance Digital Asset and Payment Infrastructure Across Southeast Asia
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Providenciales, Turks and Caicos Islands, KuCoin, a reputable worldwide crypto platform focused on trust, revealed its consideration for a partnership with Lightnet, a fintech firm in Southeast Asia. The collaboration aims to merge KuCoin's international digital asset trading services with Lightnet's expertise in the region.

data.title: Dreame Launches More Than 20 Smart Home Products at DREAME NEXT Living Next Showcase, Highlighting Bionic Robotic Arm Platform Expansion
data.description: Today in San Francisco, Dreame Technology, a prominent global technology company, unveiled over 20 innovative smart home products and numerous pioneering technologies at the Living Next segment of DREAME NEXT. This launch includes groundbreaking features like the centerpiece of the showcase, marking a significant milestone in the industry.

data.title: América Móvil Files Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: In Mexico City, América Móvil, S.A.B. de C.V. ("AMX") [BMV: AMX] [NYSE: AMX], has submitted its annual report for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission ("SEC"), the Mexican National Banking and Securities Commission ("CNBV"), and the Mexican Stock Exchange (Bolsa Mexicana de Valores, S.A.B. de C.V., "BMV"). The English version of the report is available on the SEC's website.
